item.title: Should ADHD Have a Different Name?
item.description: ADHD affects more than just attention, which is why some experts and creators debate whether the current name truly reflects the condition. This explores alternative ways people describe it.

media:content.media:title: Should ADHD Have a Different Name?
media:content.media:description: ADHD affects more than just attention, which is why some experts and creators debate whether the current name truly reflects the condition. This explores alternative ways people describe it.
